meta.name: python-mcp-server
meta.title: Python Mcp Server Skill
meta.description: Instructions for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers using the Python SDK Triggers on: **/*.py, **/pyproject.toml, **/requirements.txt

original_definition.skill_description: Instructions for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers using the Python SDK Triggers on: **/*.py, **/pyproject.toml, **/requirements.txt

actions.name: Import FastMCP from `mcp.server.fastmcp`: `from mcp.server.f
actions.description: Import FastMCP from `mcp.server.fastmcp`: `from mcp.server.fastmcp import FastMCP`

actions.name: For HTTP servers, use `mcp.run(transport="streamable-http")`
actions.description: For HTTP servers, use `mcp.run(transport="streamable-http")` or mount to Starlette/FastAPI

actions.name: Send logs with `await ctx.debug()`, `await ctx.info()`, `awa
actions.description: Send logs with `await ctx.debug()`, `await ctx.info()`, `await ctx.warning()`, `await ctx.error()`

actions.name: Use LLM sampling with `await ctx.session.create_message(mess
actions.description: Use LLM sampling with `await ctx.session.create_message(messages, max_tokens)`

actions.name: Configure icons with `Icon(src="path", mimeType="image/png")
actions.description: Configure icons with `Icon(src="path", mimeType="image/png")` for server, tools, resources, prompts

actions.name: Use `Image` class for automatic image handling: `return Imag
actions.description: Use `Image` class for automatic image handling: `return Image(data=bytes, format="png")`

actions.name: Define resource templates with URI patterns: `@mcp.resource(
actions.description: Define resource templates with URI patterns: `@mcp.resource("greeting://{name}")`

actions.name: Implement completion support by accepting partial values and
actions.description: Implement completion support by accepting partial values and returning suggestions

actions.name: Use lifespan context managers for startup/shutdown with shar
actions.description: Use lifespan context managers for startup/shutdown with shared resources

actions.name: Test servers with: `uv run mcp dev server.py` (Inspector) or
actions.description: Test servers with: `uv run mcp dev server.py` (Inspector) or `uv run mcp install server.py` (Claude Desktop)

actions.name: Configure CORS for browser clients: expose `Mcp-Session-Id`
actions.description: Configure CORS for browser clients: expose `Mcp-Session-Id` header

rules.description: Type hints are mandatory - they're used for schema generation and validation

directives.description: Use uv for project management: `uv init mcp-server-demo` and `uv add "mcp[cli]"`
Use Pydantic models, TypedDicts, or dataclasses for structured output
Tools automatically return structured output when return types are compatible
Use `Context` parameter in tools/resources to access MCP capabilities: `ctx: Context`
Report progress with `await ctx.report_progress(progress, total, message)`
Request user input with `await ctx.elicit(message, schema)`
Access lifespan context in tools via `ctx.request_context.lifespan_context`
For stateless HTTP servers, set `stateless_http=True` in FastMCP initialization
Enable JSON responses for modern clients: `json_response=True`
